title: Bedrock Flavor
description: Adds several features from Bedrock edition.
body:
![about](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14c7aad3f30e25256446337c482646cbf0ad2507.png) Minecraft Java and Bedrock differ in many subtle ways: textures, animations, particles, and various visual details. This resource pack aims to **restore visual parity** between the two editions, refining Java’s visuals to more closely **match the Bedrock style.** ![divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b726dffef3bff5a52af4ab17734c700754958997_0.webp)
![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b166bc402e7aacbd3e4c6a09622c3ef217230866.png) ### Improvements - In addition to altered textures, we have also changed: Sounds, block lighting, particles, and much more! - Even the smallest details have been adjusted to match the Bedrock experience. ### Support for Popular Mods - Beyond base game assets, we also bring the Bedrock visual identity to several modded interfaces. - Examples: Bedrockify, Emotecraft, Iris, Modmenu, Resourcify, and more! ### Compatibility - Compatible with Sodium. Not tested with Optifine. - Versions below 1.21.4 may retain partial functionality, but are **not supported.**
![divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b726dffef3bff5a52af4ab17734c700754958997_0.webp) **

Not an official Minecraft product. Not approved by or associated with Mojang or Microsoft.

**
